---
title: "Biología Computacional y Ecología Microbiana"
toc: false
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image: bcem-logo.png
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/bcem_uniandes
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/BCEM-UniAndes
---

:::{#hero-heading}

We are a multidisciplinary group involved in the development of computational biology. We work in diverse research areas such as microbial ecology, genomics, population genetics and systems biology.

:::
